summary: Tested the booking availability system - API and frontend both working correctly. Backend API returns available slots based on service's available_days and available_hours configuration. Frontend booking modal shows date cards with slot selection integrated with the API.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12 passed, 1 skipped - admin can't book own service)

seed_data_creation: Used existing service with available_days: [0,1,2,3,4] and available_hours: [{start:'09:00',end:'12:00'}, {start:'14:00',end:'18:00'}]
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking availability system fully tested and working. Backend generates 30-min slots based on service availability config and excludes booked slots. Frontend shows date cards (14 days) and time slots after selecting a date.

tests_passed: Returns empty for weekend (not in available_days)

features_verified: Modal opens with 'Sélectionnez une date *' label
14 date cards displayed (day name, number, month)
Clicking date fetches available slots from API
